entities.name: KeSetTargetProcessorDpcEx
entities.description: Sets the target processor for a DPC (Deferred Procedure Call) with extended processor number support. This function is only available in Windows 7 and later versions.

entities.name: RTL_OSVERSIONINFOEXW
entities.description: Contains operating system version information including major version, minor version, and build number.

entities.name: KdPrintEx
entities.description: Prints debug messages with specified component ID and level

entities.name: EVT_WDF_DRIVER_DEVICE_ADD
entities.description: A driver's EvtDriverDeviceAdd callback function is called when the framework enumerates a new device.

entities.name: VER_SET_CONDITION
entities.description: Sets the comparison condition for version checking. Used with RtlVerifyVersionInfo to specify version requirements.

entities.name: KmdfHelloWorldEvtDeviceAdd
entities.description: KMDF Hello World sample's device add callback function. Parameters: _In_ WDFDRIVER Driver, _Inout_ PWDFDEVICE_INIT DeviceInit

entities.name: GUID_DEVINTERFACE_MOUSE
entities.description: 设备接口类GUID，用于标识鼠标设备接口。

entities.name: NTDDI_WIN10
entities.description: Windows 10 version macro definition used in WDK headers for version-specific DDI elements. This macro is typically used in conditional compilation checks.

entities.name: GetPrintExecutionData
entities.description: Retrieves print execution data. Available in Windows 7 and later versions.

entities.name: KEY_WRITE
entities.description: Registry access right constant that combines KEY_SET_VALUE, KEY_CREATE_SUB_KEY, and other write permissions
